design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → workflow-command-center architecture selected. AIDA Check: clear hero (Attention), proof & market context (Interest), agent demos & workflows (Desire), repeated CTAs (Action). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk for editorial weight and clarity. Hero Math Verification: max-width 1120px, clamp-based sizing ensures 2–3 line headline. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow: dense present in .bento and .compare-grid. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs black-pill primary with contrast-checked white secondary.
headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A premium niche landing page for creators and coaches who want to turn calls, DMs, and voice notes into durable content and operational workflows. Shows how Super’s personal AI agents can operate real software, reuse a computer-use cache, and outperform chat-style assistants for repeated post-call work.
